column1: # /Worksheet Hide — Enable hides the current worksheet and redirects
# the pointer to the next visible one; Disable redisplays every
# hidden sheet.  Refuses to hide the only visible sheet.
# Seed sheet A with a marker, insert a sheet after, seed sheet B,
# come back to A.  /WISA leaves the pointer on A; Ctrl-PgDn reveals
# /WHE hides sheet A; pointer redirects to the first remaining
# visible sheet (B).  Ctrl-PgUp would normally jump back to A but A
# is hidden, so the pointer stays put.
# Trying to hide the last visible sheet errors out (sheet B is
# the only visible one now).  Press ENTER to dismiss the error.
ASSERT_PANEL_L2  Cannot hide the only visible sheet
# /WHD redisplays sheet A.  Ctrl-PgUp jumps back to it.
# Hide A again, then Alt-F4 undoes the hide.
